reference_source: Operator practice; gr33n animal_feed category — not full ration math
readme_md:
# Livestock comfrey & sprout feed v1

Simple **animal_feed** inputs — comfrey slurry and sprouted grain — with flock supplement examples. **Not** TMR balancing or veterinary formulation.

Apply via `POST /farms/{id}/naturalfarming/apply-pack` when Animals module is enabled.

input_definitions.name: Comfrey Slurry (Livestock Supplement)
input_definitions.description: Fresh comfrey leaves blended or soaked to slurry for flock supplement. Not sole ration.
input_definitions.preparation_summary: Harvest comfrey; chop; soak or blend with water; feed fresh within 24 h.
input_definitions.storage_guidelines: Use same day — do not store slurry long; anaerobic spoilage risk.
input_definitions.safety_precautions: Comfrey contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids — moderation for poultry; not majority of ration.

input_definitions.name: Sprouted Grain (Livestock Supplement)
input_definitions.description: Soaked and sprouted grain (barley, wheat, or similar) as a treat or supplement.
input_definitions.preparation_summary: Soak grain 8–12 h, drain, sprout 2–5 days with daily rinse until short tails appear.
input_definitions.storage_guidelines: Refrigerate sprouts max 1–2 days; discard moldy trays.
input_definitions.safety_precautions: Moldy sprouts — discard. Treat/supplement only with balanced forage or ration.

application_recipes.name: Comfrey Slurry Flock Supplement
application_recipes.description: Daily comfrey slurry treat for chickens or goats — small supplement only.
application_recipes.dilution_ratio: Fresh slurry — operator volume by flock size
application_recipes.instructions: Offer in shallow trough; remove uneaten slurry within a few hours.
application_recipes.frequency_guidelines: 2–3 times per week as treat — not primary ration.

application_recipes.name: Sprouted Grain Treat Batch
application_recipes.description: Short-tail sprouted grain offered as flock treat or supplement.
application_recipes.dilution_ratio: Whole sprouts — handful per bird or small bowl for goats
application_recipes.instructions: Feed when white root tails appear; discard mold immediately.
application_recipes.frequency_guidelines: Daily small treat during active sprouting cycle.

recipe_input_components.notes: Fresh slurry volume by flock size
